title: BUGALUGS Dog Glove Wipes, pet wipes for full body, eye wipes, ear wipes, bum & paws. 30 sensitive dog grooming glove wipes for dogs, puppy & cat grooming, One size fits all (Fragrance Free)
features: Pet Glove Wipes - super easy to use for full body, face, ears, bum and paws

All natural – our wipes contain only natural ingredients including chamomile, aloe vera, shea butter, cucumber & vitamin E. Gentle enough for daily use, even on sensitive areas. Free from parabens, sulphates and alcohol

30 Glove wipes - Super value, thick, textured and extra-large dog wipes 25cm x 25cm (one size fits all) perfect for full body, ears, eyes, bum & paws. Use as puppy wipes, pet wipes for cats, pet wipes dog and on small animals

No bath, more play! - Pawfect for water-free cleansing! At home or on the go, our gentle formula is fragrance free, alcohol free, hypoallergenic, Ph balanced and vegan - perfect for an effortless clean that requires no water or rinsing!
Use alongside our Bugalugs grooming products for dogs – these include dog shampoo and conditioner, dog perfume, cat shampoo, dog deodorant spray, dog cologne spray, dog dry shampoo and many more
description: Product description No bath, more play! Bugalugs fragrance-free dog glove wipes are enriched with a natural formula utilising the soothing and cleansing benefits of chamomile, cucumber, aloe vera, shea butter and vitamin E for a gentle cleanse. Multipurpose use as dog glove wipes for bums, dog ear cleaner wipes, dog wipes for smelly dogs, cat eye wipes or dog face wipes. Bugalugs wipes are perfect for an on the go, effortless clean that requires no water or rinsing. With a special textured design specifically created to agitate and remove dirt swiftly from your pets coat and skin, our glove wipes remove unwanted odours without causing irritation. Simple and effective, our extra-large, high quality, super thick dog wet wipe gloves are excellent value with 30x 25cm x 25cm dog cleaning wipes per pack size! Easy to use and travel friendly packaging, simply open the lid and peel back the resealable label. Remove wipe and gently clean full body, face, bum & paws making sure to use both sides of the glove wipe, with no rinsing required. Close the lid after use to ensure the wipes do not dry out. Safe for use every day on all pets including dogs, puppies, cats, horses, and small animals. Ingredients Chamomile, Aloe Vera, Shea Butter, Cucumber, Pomegranate, Vitamin E Directions Take a wipe, clean your pet's body, bum, and paws, then dispose of the glove wipe. See more
